title: Cheese-pull Spicy American Dum Gyoza
description: A twist on traditional gyoza with a spicy kick and melted cheese. This gluten-free friendly dish is perfect for a weeknight meal.

ingredients.name: Ground turkey
ingredients.notes: Make sure to buy lean ground turkey for a healthier option.

ingredients.name: Shredded cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: A blend of cheddar and mozzarella works well too.

ingredients.name: Cabbage
ingredients.notes: You can use napa or green cabbage, whichever is available.

ingredients.name: Gyoza wrappers
ingredients.notes: Make sure to buy gluten-free gyoza wrappers.

ingredients.name: Pickle juice
ingredients.notes: This adds a tangy flavor to the fillings.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Use low-sodium soy sauce for a healthier option.

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.notes: Grated ginger adds a nice flavor to the fillings.

ingredients.name: Sesame oil
ingredients.notes: This adds a nutty flavor to the fillings.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt for a cleaner flavor.

ingredients.name: Pepper
ingredients.notes: Use black pepper for a classic flavor.

ingredients.name: Scallions
ingredients.notes: Chopped scallions add a nice flavor and texture to the dish.

instructions: In a large bowl, combine ground turkey, shredded cheddar cheese, cabbage, and scallions.
